hero_copy: North Ember serves textured espresso, bright filter brews, and low-light evenings built for conversation.
hero_title: A neighborhood coffee room with a warm pulse.

journal.text: Analog soul, ambient jazz, and soft-volume sets from 20:00 to close.
journal.title: Friday listening sets

journal.text: Every Tuesday at 09:00 we open the brew bar for comparative pourovers.
journal.title: Morning brew lab

journal.text: Burnt vanilla bun, olive oil cake, and sesame shortbread rotate weekly.
journal.title: House pastry drop

story_copy: The room opens with washed oak, rust lacquer, and daylight in the morning, then turns into an amber listening corner after sunset.
story_points: Single-origin wall refreshed every two weeks
Quiet daytime tables with power and fast wifi
story_title: Designed like a listening bar, brewed like a roastery counter.
tagline: Slow coffee, bright rooms, late records.
